title: 1.1: Shows the final merged result by reporting the reconstructed byte stream with numeric length for Variant 1 (identical overlap) from sniff(offline=..., session=TCPSession).
1.2: Reports the reconstructed byte stream for Variant 2 (different overlap) showing which bytes won in the overlap region (e.g., b'XXXX' overwrote b'CCCC').
1.3: Traces the runtime call path from sniff(offline=..., session=TCPSession) through to StringBuffer.append in /app/scapy/sessions.py.
1.4: Explains the overwrite mechanism as unconditional memoryview slice assignment memoryview(self.content)[seq:seq + data_len] = data without a preserve old bytes guard.
1.5: Provides verbatim terminal excerpt showing the command line invocation that executes the demonstration script.
1.6: Specifies the TCP sequence numbers showing how segments overlap (e.g., Seg1 seq=1000 covering bytes 0-11, Seg2 seq=1058 covering bytes 8-15).
